art_market.summary: Global art market grew 4% to $59.6 billion in 2025; US leads with 44% share. Market focus shifting to quality, physical presence, and historical stalwarts over rapid digital growth.

stock_market.summary: Market volatility driven by Iran conflict and inflation concerns. Rotation from mega-cap tech to stable sectors (staples, energy). Gold hitting record highs.
key_drivers: Higher inflation, lower rate cut expectations
